class.name: VisualShaderGroup
class.brief_description: A reusable group of [VisualShaderNode]s similar to a function in programming.
class.description: A [VisualShaderGroup] encapsulates a graph of [VisualShaderNode]s into a reusable component. It defines its own input and output ports, which become the interface when the group is used as a [VisualShaderNodeGroup] node inside a [VisualShader] or another [VisualShaderGroup]. Since an actual shader function is created for each [VisualShaderGroup], you can only use global built-in variables. Parameter and Varying related nodes are not allowed. If the group contains nodes that are incompatible with the shader context it is used in (e.g. particle nodes in a spatial shader), the group's outputs will silently fall back to default values.

method.name: add_node
method.description: Adds the specified [param node] to the group.

method.name: attach_node_to_frame
method.description: Attaches the given node to the given frame.

method.name: can_connect_nodes
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified nodes and ports can be connected.

method.name: connect_nodes
method.description: Connects the specified nodes and ports.

method.name: connect_nodes_forced
method.description: Connects the specified nodes and ports, even if they can't be connected.

method.name: detach_node_from_frame
method.description: Detaches the given node from the frame it is attached to.

method.name: disconnect_nodes
method.description: Disconnects the specified nodes and ports.

method.name: get_input_port_count
method.description: Returns the number of input ports defined for this group.

method.name: get_input_port_name
method.description: Returns the name of the input port at the given [param id].

method.name: get_input_port_type
method.description: Returns the type of the input port at the given [param id].

method.name: get_node
method.description: Returns the shader node instance with the specified [param id].

method.name: get_node_connections
method.description: Returns the list of connected nodes.

method.name: get_node_list
method.description: Returns the list of all nodes in the group.

method.name: get_node_position
method.description: Returns the position of the specified node within the shader graph.

method.name: get_output_port_count
method.description: Returns the number of output ports defined for this group.

method.name: get_output_port_name
method.description: Returns the name of the output port at the given [param id].

method.name: get_output_port_type
method.description: Returns the type of the output port at the given [param id].

method.name: get_valid_node_id
method.description: Returns the next valid node ID that can be added to the shader graph.

method.name: insert_input_port
method.description: Inserts an input port at the given [param id] with the specified [param type] and [param name]. Returns the validated port name, which may differ from [param name] if a port with the same name already exists. Port names must be unique across both input and output ports.

method.name: insert_output_port
method.description: Inserts an output port at the given [param id] with the specified [param type] and [param name]. Returns the validated port name, which may differ from [param name] if a port with the same name already exists. Port names must be unique across both input and output ports.

method.name: is_node_connection
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified node and port connection exists.

method.name: move_input_port
method.description: Moves the input port at index [param from] to index [param to]. Connections from input nodes inside the group will be updated accordingly.

method.name: move_output_port
method.description: Moves the output port at index [param from] to index [param to]. Connections to output nodes inside the group will be updated accordingly.

method.name: remove_input_port
method.description: Removes the input port at the given [param id].

method.name: remove_node
method.description: Removes the specified node from the group.

method.name: remove_output_port
method.description: Removes the output port at the given [param id].

method.name: replace_node
method.description: Replaces the specified node with a node of the new class type.

method.name: set_input_port_name
method.description: Sets the name of the input port at the given [param id].

method.name: set_input_port_type
method.description: Sets the type of the input port at the given [param id].

method.name: set_node_position
method.description: Sets the position of the specified node.

method.name: set_output_port_name
method.description: Sets the name of the output port at the given [param id].

method.name: set_output_port_type
method.description: Sets the type of the output port at the given [param id].

members.member: The display name of this group. This name is shown as the caption of the [VisualShaderNodeGroup] node in the editor.
